description: Build AI Code Roaster - paste code and get a humorous roast of your code quality with a shareable 'code quality score' card. Developers love sharing these on Twitter.
steps: Create directory viral-ai-saas/ai-code-roaster/ with standard structure: server.js, package.json, db/, routes/, views/, public/css/, public/js/, tests/, README.md, .gitignore
Create package.json with dependencies: express, ejs, better-sqlite3, bcrypt, express-session

Create db/schema.sql with tables: users (id, email, password_hash, created_at), roasts (id, user_id nullable, code_snippet, language, readability_score, efficiency_score, style_score, overall_score, roast_text, share_id unique, created_at)
Create routes/auth.js with standard auth routes

Create routes/roast.js with: POST /roast/generate (accepts code snippet and language, generates mock AI code roast with scores for readability/efficiency/style/overall 1-10, funny roast comments per category), GET /roast/:shareId (public shareable code roast card)

The mock code roaster should analyze basic code characteristics (length, nesting depth via brace counting, variable naming patterns, comment ratio) to produce somewhat-relevant roasts. Include sections: Variable Naming Crimes, Architecture Atrocities, Comment Catastrophes, Overall Verdict. Each with grade (A-F) and witty commentary.

Create views/index.ejs - developer-focused landing page with code editor-style input (monospace, dark theme textarea with line numbers feel), language selector dropdown, example roasts, GitHub-inspired aesthetic

Create views/result.ejs - roast results with code snippet displayed in syntax-highlighted style, scores as letter grades (A-F) in badge cards, detailed roast text sections, share buttons, 'Roast More Code' button
Create views/share.ejs - public shareable code roast card, styled like a report card for code, with CTA
Create public/css/style.css with developer/hacker theme - dark background, green/cyan terminal-style accents, monospace fonts for code, card-based score display
Create public/js/app.js with code input handling (tab support in textarea), form submission, share functionality, syntax highlighting basic support

Create tests/app.test.js with tests: server startup, landing page, auth flow, code roast generation (valid code input, missing code, different languages), score validation (1-10 range), share page access, history
acceptance_criteria: Landing page renders with code input textarea and language selector
Submitting code returns a roast with readability/efficiency/style/overall scores
Roast text includes categorized humorous commentary
Shareable link displays the roast card publicly
findings: All 27 tests pass. App created at viral-ai-saas/ai-code-roaster/ with full auth, code roast generation with analysis of nesting depth, variable naming, comment ratio and line length. Produces categorized roasts (Variable Naming Crimes, Architecture Atrocities, Comment Catastrophes, Overall Verdict) with letter grades A-F and numeric scores 1-10. Shareable report cards, dashboard history, and dark terminal-themed UI. No external API calls needed.
